mainEntity.name: What is the most expensive fish in Stardew Valley?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lava Eel (700g base, 1,050g with Angler), Legend (1,500g base), Glacierfish (900g base), Crimsonfish (1,500g base), and Mutant Carp (1,500g base). Legendary fish can only be caught once.

mainEntity.name: Where can I catch all fish in Stardew Valley?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use our interactive fish database by season, location, and weather. Each fish has specific conditions: time of day, season, weather, and location (ocean, lake, river, mines, desert, Ginger Island).
